response.justification: While Bogdan has an exceptional technical background with extensive experience in developer tooling, CI/CD, and testing infrastructure, he lacks the necessary people management experience. The role explicitly requires a minimum of two years managing teams, conducting 1:1s, and handling performance evaluations for a Level II Manager position. His background is firmly rooted in Individual Contributor (IC) roles, making him unsuitable for this specific mid-to-senior management track position despite his strong domain expertise.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, far exceeding the 8-year minimum.
Strong, highly relevant background in building developer tools, testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and CI/CD infrastructure.
Demonstrated mobile-platform knowledge, having successfully developed and maintained iOS and Apple TV applications.
concerns: Fails to meet the minimum requirement of 2 years in formal people management or team leadership.
No demonstrated experience conducting 1:1s, setting performance expectations, or managing organizational change.
Career trajectory is strictly aligned with Senior/Staff Individual Contributor roles rather than Engineering Management.
